full_description: BookBuddy is a reading tracker app that helps users discover new books and track their reading progress. It provides personalized recommendations based on reading history. With BookBuddy, you can easily log and track the books you've read, add books to your wishlist, and explore new titles and authors. The app learns your reading preferences over time, suggesting books that you're likely to enjoy. Whether you're a casual reader or an avid bookworm, BookBuddy is the perfect companion for your literary journey. Download BookBuddy today and start discovering your next great read!
